description: A SCADA system is monitoring a wastewater lift station for potential failures.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the wet well level and the run times of the pumps.

expected_outcome.expected: System is continuously collecting operational data.

nodes.task_description: The system detects that the wet well level is high, but the pumps are not running.

expected_outcome.expected: System generates a critical alarm for a potential lift station failure.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a maintenance crew immediately to troubleshoot the issue (e.g., power failure, clogged pump) before a sewer overflow occurs.

expected_outcome.expected: System creates a Priority 1 emergency work order.
